# MassPermits

> MassPermits turns Massachusetts building-permit records into ready-to-work leads for contractors.
> Each lead includes the property address, owner, contractor, project type and project value, organized
> by trade and town. Coverage: Greater Boston and Cape Cod (11037+ recent permits), expanding statewide.

## Products
- Free sample: a masked teaser of the latest permits — https://masspermits.com
- One-time Lead Pack ($49): a current batch of permit leads for a chosen area/trade.
- Weekly Feed ($99/mo): fresh permit leads delivered every week.

## Browse permit data
- All towns & trades: https://masspermits.com/permits/
- Building permits in Boston, MA: https://masspermits.com/permits/boston
- Building permits in Braintree, MA: https://masspermits.com/permits/braintree
- Building permits in Rockland, MA: https://masspermits.com/permits/rockland
- Building permits in Hingham, MA: https://masspermits.com/permits/hingham
- Building permits in Falmouth, MA: https://masspermits.com/permits/falmouth
- Building permits in Mashpee, MA: https://masspermits.com/permits/mashpee
- Building permits in Dorchester, MA: https://masspermits.com/permits/dorchester
- Building permits in Roxbury, MA: https://masspermits.com/permits/roxbury
- Building permits in Jamaica Plain, MA: https://masspermits.com/permits/jamaica-plain
- Building permits in Roslindale, MA: https://masspermits.com/permits/roslindale
- Building permits in Hyannis, MA: https://masspermits.com/permits/hyannis
- Building permits in Brighton, MA: https://masspermits.com/permits/brighton

## Leads by trade (Massachusetts)
- Roofing leads: https://masspermits.com/roofing-leads-massachusetts
- Solar leads: https://masspermits.com/solar-leads-massachusetts
- HVAC leads: https://masspermits.com/hvac-leads-massachusetts
- Electrical leads: https://masspermits.com/electrical-leads-massachusetts
- Plumbing leads: https://masspermits.com/plumbing-leads-massachusetts
- Kitchen/Bath leads: https://masspermits.com/kitchen-bath-leads-massachusetts
- Windows/Doors/Siding leads: https://masspermits.com/windows-doors-siding-leads-massachusetts
- Pool/Spa leads: https://masspermits.com/pool-spa-leads-massachusetts
- New Construction leads: https://masspermits.com/new-construction-leads-massachusetts
- Deck/Porch leads: https://masspermits.com/deck-porch-leads-massachusetts
- Renovation/Remodel leads: https://masspermits.com/renovation-remodel-leads-massachusetts

## About
- Data source: public municipal building-permit records.
- Buyers: roofers, solar installers, HVAC, electricians, plumbers, remodelers, GCs and more.
- Contact: hello@masspermits.com
